message:
feat(fp-frame): add DataFrameGroupBy.agg_named() for named aggregation (frankenpandas-ka5)

Add pandas-style named aggregation to DataFrameGroupBy:

```rust
let result = df.groupby(&["region"]).unwrap().agg_named(&[
    ("total_sales", "revenue", "sum"),
    ("avg_price", "price", "mean"),
    ("num_orders", "order_id", "count"),
]).unwrap();
```

Each tuple is (output_column_name, input_column, aggregation_function).
Output columns are named by the first element, not the input column.
Validates column existence and rejects aggregation on group-by keys.

4 new tests covering basic usage, value correctness, missing column
error, and key column error. All pass, clippy clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
